body_txt: It is often said that truth is stranger than fiction note But it is never as strange as lies . Little Known Facts are much too strange to be true. These improbable legends may be explained by the Know-Nothing Know-It-All , The Ditz or the Cloudcuckoolander , or just by someone trying to take advantage of the gullibility of some person, usually a child. If any questions are asked, the answers will only compound the absurdity. For the record, snow comes from up, not down. That's why you never trust a quack like Lucy Van Pelt. Compare The Blind Leading the Blind , Don't Be Ridiculous , Common Knowledge , Urban Legends and Lies to Children . If said facts are true, it's not this trope. It's probably Reality Is Unrealistic , or one of its subtropes.
